name: Okrugli Vrsak
recipeIngredient: Raisins OR nuts OR fruit mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Incorporate all the flavorings (vanilla, almond) and salt.
4. Mix in the flour and baking powder mixture gradually, stirring only until combined to form a creamy batter.
5. If using raisins, fruit mix, or nuts, sprinkle with a little additional flour before folding them into the dough.
6. Shape the dough into rounds and place in a tube pan or loaf pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15-25 minutes, or until fully cooked.
